GBS

Adults Only

This site discusses cannabis cultivation, breeding, smoke reports, and community projects. Confirm you are of legal age in your location.

GBS is an education and community hub. No cannabis sales happen here.

GBS Painting Room Public mural, studio tools, shared chaos
Projects Bots Games Smoke Reports Painting Room Content Manager Join Discord

GBS creative wall

Painting Room

A living wall anyone can paint.

1 artist painting
Loaded Not saved yet
Not logged in Admin
Shared persistence is not connected. This wall is currently saving only in this browser.
Tools
Pick a tool and mark the wall. Use Save Wall to lock in the latest mural state.
Color system
Objects, images, layers
Drop, paste, or upload image Log in to upload images. PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF. SVG is blocked.
Mini-map v0
Export, snapshots, safety
Account Log in to upload images and identify your contributions.
Respect the Wall

Build on the mural, avoid personal info, and do not cover someone else's work just to wipe it out. Reports, resets, restores, image uploads, and moderation actions are protected by Supabase Auth and server-side checks.

Keyboard

B brush, E eraser, T text, V select, L line, R rectangle, C circle, G grid, Delete removes selected, Ctrl/Cmd+S saves.

Admin moderation
Admin actions are logged. Reset and restore create backup snapshots first.

Reports

Assets
